          },
          {
            "text": "This folder contains dialplan snippets for **Phase 3 real-time call handling**. The Asterisk server must be able to reach your Node app over HTTP (e.g. &#96;http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001&#96;).",

          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },

            "lineNumber": 17

            "text": "- **Dialplan** → either paste the Phase 3 contexts into **&#96;/etc/asterisk/extensions.conf&#96;**, or put them in a separate file and **&#96;#include&#96;** that file from &#96;extensions.conf&#96;.",

            "line": 904,
            "column": 3
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 964,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// --- CDR recording stream ---",
            "lineNumber": 907
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 908
          },
          {
            "text": "router.get('/cdr/recording/:uniqueId', async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 909
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 910
          },
          {
            "text": "    const uniqueId = (req.params.uniqueId || '').toString().trim();",
            "lineNumber": 911
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!uniqueId) {",
            "lineNumber": 912
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'UniqueID required' });",
            "lineNumber": 913
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 914
          },
          {
            "text": "    const row = await queryOne(",
            "lineNumber": 915
          },
          {
            "text": "      'SELECT recording_path FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1',",
            "lineNumber": 916
          },
          {
            "text": "      [uniqueId]",
            "lineNumber": 917
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 918
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!row || !row.recording_path) {",
            "lineNumber": 919
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'No recording for this call' });",
            "lineNumber": 920
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 921
          },
          {
            "text": "    const basePath = (process.env.RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH || process.env.ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH || '').trim();",
            "lineNumber": 922
          },
          {
            "text": "    let filePath = row.recording_path;",
            "lineNumber": 923
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (basePath) {",
            "lineNumber": 924
          },
          {
            "text": "      filePath = path.isAbsolute(row.recording_path)",
            "lineNumber": 925
          },
          {
            "text": "        ? row.recording_path",
            "lineNumber": 926
          },
          {
            "text": "        : path.join(basePath, row.recording_path);",
            "lineNumber": 927
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (!path.isAbsolute(filePath)) {",
            "lineNumber": 928
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(500).json({",
            "lineNumber": 929
          },
          {
            "text": "        success: false,",
            "lineNumber": 930
          },
          {
            "text": "        error: 'RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH not set; cannot resolve relative recording path',",
            "lineNumber": 931
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 932
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 933
          },
          {
            "text": "    const resolvedPath = path.resolve(filePath);",
            "lineNumber": 934
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (basePath) {",
            "lineNumber": 935
          },
          {
            "text": "      const safeBase = path.resolve(basePath);",
            "lineNumber": 936
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(safeBase)) {",
            "lineNumber": 937
          },
          {
            "text": "        return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Access denied' });",
            "lineNumber": 938
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 939
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 940
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!fs.existsSync(resolvedPath)) {",
            "lineNumber": 941
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Recording file not found on server' });",
            "lineNumber": 942
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 943
          },
          {
            "text": "    const stat = fs.statSync(resolvedPath);",
            "lineNumber": 944
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!stat.isFile()) {",
            "lineNumber": 945
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Not a file' });",
            "lineNumber": 946
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {
            "text": "    const ext = path.extname(resolvedPath).toLowerCase();",
            "lineNumber": 948
          },
          {
            "text": "    const contentType = ext === '.mp3' ? 'audio/mpeg' : ext === '.ogg' ? 'audio/ogg' : 'audio/wav';",
            "lineNumber": 949
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.setHeader('Content-Type', contentType);",
            "lineNumber": 950
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.setHeader('Content-Length', stat.size);",
            "lineNumber": 951
          },
          {
            "text": "    res.setHeader('Accept-Ranges', 'bytes');",
            "lineNumber": 952
          },
          {
            "text": "    const stream = fs.createReadStream(resolvedPath);",
            "lineNumber": 953
          },
          {
            "text": "    stream.pipe(res);",
            "lineNumber": 954
          },
          {
            "text": "    stream.on('error', (err) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 955
          },
          {
            "text": "      console.error('Admin CDR recording stream error:', err);",
            "lineNumber": 956
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 958
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 965
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4238570034503937
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\asterisk\\pbx-callcentre.conf",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "; =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "; PBX Call Centre – full dialplan for new Node app (no us4group.conf)",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "; =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "; Paste this file into /etc/asterisk/ and in extensions.conf add:",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": ";   #include \"pbx-callcentre.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "; Or paste the entire contents into extensions.conf.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "; Before use:",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": ";   1. Set APIURL in [globals] to your Node app (e.g. http://10.50.7.181:3001/api/asterisk/)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ";   2. Ensure inbound_routes, queues, queue_members, sip_extensions are set in the app DB",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": ";   3. Point your trunk/DID to context \"inbound\" (e.g. from-pstn → Goto(inbound,s,1))",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": ";   4. Agent SIP login: point ARI/originate to context \"AgentLogin\" with vars AgentNumber, AgentPassword",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "; =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "[globals]",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "; Node app base URL – change to your server (no trailing slash)",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "APIURL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "; Agent login (SIP login to dashboard)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLogin=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogin?",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLogout=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogout?",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLoginSuccess?",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "; Inbound route lookup (DID → queue or extension)",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "INBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "; Phase 3 real-time call events",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL=${APIURL}IncomingCall?",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED=${APIURL}CallAnswered?",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP=${APIURL}CallHangup?",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_RECORDING=${APIURL}Recording?",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "; Recording path (optional; for MixMonitor)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "; RecPath=/var/spool/asterisk/recording/",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "; =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "; INBOUND: entry from trunk / DID",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "; =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "[inbound]",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": " same =&gt; n,Progress()",
            "lineNumber": 43
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.41997766494750977
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\asterisk\\README-CALLCENTRE.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 54
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Call Centre – Simple Asterisk Setup",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Two files only:",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **extensions.conf** – &#96;[globals]&#96; and one include",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **callcentre.conf** – all dialplan (inbound, queue, extension, agent login)",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. extensions.conf",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "In the **&#96;[globals]&#96;** section, add (replace &#96;YOUR_APP_HOST:3001&#96; with your Node app):",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "[globals]",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "; Call centre app (no trailing slash)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "APP_URL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "AGENT_LOGIN=${APP_URL}AgentLogin?",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "AGENT_LOGOUT=${APP_URL}AgentLogout?",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "AGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS=${APP_URL}AgentLoginSuccess?",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "INBOUND_ROUTE=${APP_URL}InboundRoute?",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APP_URL}QueueMembers?",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "CALL_INCOMING=${APP_URL}IncomingCall?",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "CALL_ANSWERED=${APP_URL}CallAnswered?",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "CALL_HANGUP=${APP_URL}CallHangup?",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "RECORDING=${APP_URL}Recording?",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "Then include the dialplan file:",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "#include \"callcentre.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. callcentre.conf",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "- Copy **callcentre.conf** from this folder to your Asterisk config directory (e.g. &#96;/etc/asterisk/&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "- It contains everything: inbound, WhereToGO, Queue, SipExtension, callstatus, AgentLogin, notify-incoming/answered/hangup, ring-agent, hangup-customer, from-pstn, from-internal.",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Queue calls: dashboard-only (no softphone ring until agent answers)",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "For **queue** calls, the dialplan sends the customer to the Stasis app **queue-dashboard**. The call appears **only** on the agent’s dashboard; the agent’s softphone does **not** ring until the agent clicks **Answer**. Then the app uses ARI to create a bridge and ring the agent’s phone; when they answer, the call is connected.",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "**Requirements:**",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "- **ARI** must be enabled on Asterisk and reachable from the Node app (&#96;.env&#96;: &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_URL&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_USER&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_PASSWORD&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "- In **ari.conf**, ensure the Stasis app **queue-dashboard** is allowed (or use the default &#96;allowed_origins&#96; so the Node app can connect to the ARI WebSocket).",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "- The Node app connects to ARI’s WebSocket and handles Stasis events for &#96;queue-dashboard&#96;; no extra Asterisk config is needed beyond ARI.",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "After a call ends (hangup from dashboard or phone), the agent session stays connected and the agent is ready for the next call.",
            "lineNumber": 54
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.41667234897613525
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\asterisk\\README-PBX-CALLCENTRE.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Full dialplan for new app (no us4group.conf)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "This describes the **standalone** dialplan that works with the new Node app only. You do **not** use &#96;us4group.conf&#96; anymore.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Files",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "| File | Purpose |",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "|------|--------|",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "| **pbx-callcentre.conf** | Full dialplan: globals, inbound, queue, extension, AgentLogin, Phase 3. Paste or include this on the Asterisk server. |",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "## Where to paste on the Asterisk server",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "### Option A – Single include (recommended)",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Copy **pbx-callcentre.conf** to the Asterisk config directory:",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "   sudo cp pbx-callcentre.conf /etc/asterisk/",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Edit **/etc/asterisk/extensions.conf** and add **one line** (e.g. at the top, after &#96;[general]&#96; if present):",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "   #include \"pbx-callcentre.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "3. In **pbx-callcentre.conf** (on the server), set **APIURL** in the &#96;[globals]&#96; section to your Node app URL, for example:",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "   APIURL=http://10.50.7.181:3001/api/asterisk/",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "   Use your app’s host/IP and port (default 3001). No trailing slash.",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "### Option B – You already have [globals] in extensions.conf",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "If **extensions.conf** already has a &#96;[globals]&#96; section:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Do **not** add another &#96;[globals]&#96; block. Open **pbx-callcentre.conf**, copy **only the variable lines** (from &#96;APIURL=&#96; through &#96;PHASE3_RECORDING=...&#96;), and paste them into the existing &#96;[globals]&#96; in **extensions.conf**. Set **APIURL** to your Node app URL.",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Copy the **rest** of **pbx-callcentre.conf** (from &#96;[inbound]&#96; to the end) into **extensions.conf**, or put that part in a separate file and &#96;#include&#96; it.",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "## Pointing calls at the new dialplan",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Inbound from trunk / DID**  ",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  Your trunk or DID must send calls into the **inbound** context.  ",
            "lineNumber": 45
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4119369089603424
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\routes\\superadmin\\cdr-reports.js",
        "range": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// Stream recording file for a call (by unique_id). Requires RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH or recording_path to be server-accessible.",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "router.get('/cdr/recording/:uniqueId', async (req, res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "    const uniqueId = (req.params.uniqueId || '').toString().trim();",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!uniqueId) {",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'UniqueID required' });",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "    const row = await queryOne(",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "      'SELECT recording_path, tenant_id FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1',",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "      [uniqueId]",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!row || !row.recording_path) {",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'No recording for this call' });",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; Number(row.tenant_id) !== Number(effectiveTenantId)) {",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'You can only access recordings for your tenant' });",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "    const basePath = (process.env.RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH || process.env.ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH || '').trim();",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    let filePath = row.recording_path;",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (basePath) {",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "      filePath = path.isAbsolute(row.recording_path)",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "        ? row.recording_path",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "        : path.join(basePath, row.recording_path);",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (!path.isAbsolute(filePath)) {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(500).json({",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "        success: false,",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "        error: 'RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH not set; cannot resolve relative recording path',",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "    const resolvedPath = path.resolve(filePath);",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (basePath) {",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "      const safeBase = path.resolve(basePath);",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(safeBase)) {",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "        return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Access denied' });",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!fs.existsSync(resolvedPath)) {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Recording file not found on server' });",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "    const stat = fs.statSync(resolvedPath);",

          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!stat.isFile()) {",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Not a file' });",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "    const ext = path.extname(resolvedPath).toLowerCase();",

          },

            "text": "    const contentType = ext === '.mp3' ? 'audio/mpeg' :;",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },

            "text": "}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\routes\\superadmin\\settings.js",
        "range": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// --- Asterisk logs (same server: ASTERISK_LOG_DIR; remote: ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL + config-receiver) ---",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "const ASTERISK_LOG_DIR = process.env.ASTERISK_LOG_DIR?.trim().replace(/\\/$/, '') || '';",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "const ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL = process.env.ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL?.trim().replace(/\\/$/, '') || '';",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "const ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_KEY = process.env.ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_KEY?.trim() || '';",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "const ALLOWED_LOG_FILES = new Set(['full', 'messages', 'queue_log']);",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "function getLogFilePath(file) {",
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!file || !ALLOWED_LOG_FILES.has(file) || !ASTERISK_LOG_DIR) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "  const resolved = path.join(ASTERISK_LOG_DIR, file);",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!resolved.startsWith(path.resolve(ASTERISK_LOG_DIR))) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  return resolved;",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "router.get('/asterisk-logs', requireSuperadmin,",
            "lineNumber": 67
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4017753601074219
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\migrations\\002_phase3_call_records_realtime.sql",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 34
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "-- Phase 3: Call records (CDR) and recording path.",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Run after 001. USE pbx_callcentre;",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Unified call records for inbound and outbound (CDR)",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS call_records (",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  tenant_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  unique_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  channel_id VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  source_number VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  destination_number VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  agent_user_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  agent_extension VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  agent_id VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  direction VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inbound',",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  queue_name VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  answer_time DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  end_time DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  duration_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  talk_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'initiated',",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  recording_path VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL,",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_tenant (tenant_id),",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_agent_user (agent_user_id),",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_unique_id (unique_id),",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_start_time (start_time),",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  INDEX idx_status (status)",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": ") ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "-- Optional: link agent_status to current call for quick lookup",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "-- ALTER TABLE agent_status ADD COLUMN current_call_unique_id VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4006585478782654
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\old\\asterisk\\res_config_sqlite.conf",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 11
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "[general]",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "; The database file.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "dbfile =&gt; /var/lib/asterisk/sqlite.db",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "; Both config_table and cdr_table are optional. If config_table is omitted,",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "; you must specify it in extconfig.conf. If it is both provided here and in",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "; extconfig.conf, the value given here is used. If cdr_table is omitted, CDR",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "; support is simply disabled.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "config_table =&gt; ast_config",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "; cdr_table =&gt; ast_cdr",
            "lineNumber": 11
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3984406888484955
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\asterisk\\README-PHASE3-DIALPLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 107
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 168
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "exten =&gt; SipExtension,1,...",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": " same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${ExtensionNumber},Inbound))",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": " same =&gt; n,Return()",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "(Adjust &#96;ExtensionNumber&#96; / queue name to match your variables.)",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2.4 – Optional: Recording callback",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "To send the recording path to the Node app when a call is recorded:",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "- After **MixMonitor** or **Record**, when you have the file path and the call’s **UniqueID**, call the Recording URL, e.g. from a shell script or from the dialplan:",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "  Set(PHASE3_REC_PATH=${URIENCODE(${RECORDED_FILE})})",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "  Set(PHASE3_REC_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s \"${PHASE3_RECORDING}UniqueID=${UNIQUEID}&amp;Path=${PHASE3_REC_PATH}\")})",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "- Or from the command line (for testing):",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "  curl -s \"http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/Recording?UniqueID=UNIQUEID&amp;Path=/path/to/file.wav\"",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Reload and test",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "On the Asterisk server:",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "sudo asterisk -rx 'dialplan reload'",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "From the Asterisk server, test that it can reach the app:",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "curl -s \"http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/IncomingCall?AgentID=1001&amp;UniqueID=test123&amp;ChannelID=ch1&amp;CustomerChannelID=ch2&amp;CustomerNumber=15551234567&amp;QueueName=Support\"",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "You should get a JSON response like &#96;{\"ok\":true}&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. File summary",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "| File in repo | Purpose | Where it goes on Asterisk |",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------------|--------|----------------------------|",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "| **phase3-globals.conf** | Reference for globals to add | Copy the lines into &#96;[globals]&#96; in &#96;/etc/asterisk/extensions.conf&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "| **phase3-dialplan.conf** | Phase 3 contexts and subroutines | Copy to &#96;/etc/asterisk/phase3-dialplan.conf&#96; and &#96;#include \"phase3-dialplan.conf\"&#96; in &#96;extensions.conf&#96;, or paste contents into &#96;extensions.conf&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "| **phase3-example-inbound-extension.conf** | Example “inbound to extension” with Phase 3 | Optional; use as reference or include if you want that example |",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "## 5. PJSIP vs SIP",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "The Phase 3 dialplan uses **PJSIP** (e.g. &#96;Dial(PJSIP/1001,...)&#96;). If your agents are registered as **chan_sip** (SIP), change in **phase3-dialplan.conf**:",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "- Replace **&#96;PJSIP/&#96;** with **&#96;SIP/&#96;** in the &#96;Dial()&#96; line in &#96;[pbx-phase3-ring-one]&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 168
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3973686993122101
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\call-handler.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 517,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 527,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "text": " * Update recording path for a call record (from Asterisk callback).",
            "lineNumber": 521
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "text": "export async function setCallRecording(uniqueId, recordingPath) {",
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  await query(",
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "    'UPDATE call_records SET recording_path = ? WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1',",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": "    [recordingPath, uniqueId]",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39101970195770264
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\scripts\\asterisk-config-receiver\\server.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36,
            "column": 69
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Run this on the Asterisk server (e.g. 10.50.2.190).",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * The PBX app (10.50.7.181) POSTs config here; this script writes to Asterisk config files and reloads.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * Also serves Asterisk log files for the Super Admin dashboard (GET /logs/:file).",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " * Env (optional):",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " *   PORT=9999",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " *   AGENTS_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/agents.conf",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " *   PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " *   PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " *   DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " *   ASTERISK_LOG_DIR=/var/log/asterisk  (for GET /logs/:file)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " *   CONFIG_API_KEY=secret  (if set, requests must send header X-Config-API-Key: secret)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * Endpoints:",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " *   POST /config/agents       body: { content: \"...\" }  -&gt; write agents.conf, reload app_agent_pool",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " *   POST /config/pjsip       body: { content: \"...\" }  -&gt; write pjsip_custom.conf, reload pjsip",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " *   POST /config/pjsip-trunks body: { content: \"...\" } -&gt; write pjsip_trunks_custom.conf, reload pjsip",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": " *   POST /config/dialplan     body: { content: \"...\" }  -&gt; write callcentre.conf, dialplan reload",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": " *   GET  /logs/:file         ?tail=N  -&gt; last N lines of full|messages|queue_log (default tail=2000)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " *   GET  /logs/:file/stream  -&gt; SSE stream of new lines (full|messages|queue_log)",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "import http from 'http';",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "import fs from 'fs/promises';",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "import { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "import path from 'path';",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '9999', 10);",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "const AGENTS_CONF = process.env.AGENTS_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/agents.conf';",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "const PJSIP_CUSTOM = process.env.PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf';",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "const PJSIP_TRUNKS = process.env.PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf';",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "const DIALPLAN_CONF = process.env.DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf';",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "const LOG_DIR = (process.env.ASTERISK_LOG_DIR || '/var/log/asterisk').replace(/\\/$/, '');",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "const CONFIG_API_KEY = process.env.CONFIG_API_KEY?.trim() || '';",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "const ALLOWED_LOG_FILES = new Set(['full', 'messages', 'queue_log']);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.38840460777282715
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\server-health-metrics.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async function getRecordingStats() {",
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  let count = null;",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "  let diskUsedBytes = null;",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "  const basePath = (process.env.RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH || process.env.ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH || '').trim();",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "    const r = await queryOne('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM call_records WHERE recording_path IS NOT NULL AND recording_path != \"\"');",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    count = r?.n ?? 0;",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (e) {",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('[server-health] recording count:', e?.message);",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (basePath) {",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "      const resolved = path.resolve(basePath);",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (fs.existsSync(resolved)) {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "        let total = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "        const walk = (dir) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "          const entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "          for (const e of entries) {",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "            const full = path.join(dir, e.name);",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "            if (e.isDirectory()) walk(full);",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "            else total += fs.statSync(full).size;",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "        };",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "        walk(resolved);",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "        diskUsedBytes = total;",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (e) {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "      console.error('[server-health] recording disk:', e?.message);",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "    recordingCount: count,",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "    recordingDiskBytes: diskUsedBytes,",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "    recordingDiskGb: diskUsedBytes != null ? Math.round((diskUsedBytes / (1024 ** 3)) * 10) / 10 : null,",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "function buildAlerts(metrics) {",
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const alerts = [];",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3867737948894501

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\ASTERISK-CONFIG-SYNC.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 33
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "4. The process must be able to **write** to &#96;/etc/asterisk/&#96; and run &#96;asterisk -rx '...'&#96;. For the **Asterisk Logs** dashboard view (remote setup), it must also be able to **read** files under &#96;ASTERISK_LOG_DIR&#96; (e.g. &#96;full&#96;, &#96;messages&#96;, &#96;queue_log&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "5. Keep it running (e.g. systemd service or screen/tmux). Open firewall port 9999 (or your &#96;PORT&#96;) from the PBX app host only.",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. Include the PJSIP custom files in Asterisk",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "On the Asterisk server, ensure the generated extensions and trunks are loaded. In your main **&#96;pjsip.conf&#96;**, add **both** includes (order can matter if trunks reference transports; typically extensions first, then trunks):",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "; App-generated PJSIP extensions (created/overwritten by config receiver)",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "#include \"pjsip_custom.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "; App-generated PJSIP trunks (created/overwritten by config receiver)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "#include \"pjsip_trunks_custom.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "You do **not** need to create &#96;pjsip_custom.conf&#96; or &#96;pjsip_trunks_custom.conf&#96; manually. The config receiver **creates both files on startup** if they are missing (with a placeholder line), then overwrites them when the app pushes config. **Restart the config receiver** before loading Asterisk so the files exist. Alternatively, use &#96;#tryinclude&#96; so Asterisk does not fail if a file is missing:",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "#tryinclude \"pjsip_custom.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "#tryinclude \"pjsip_trunks_custom.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "Use &#96;#include&#96; (required files) for normal operation; use &#96;#tryinclude&#96; only if you want Asterisk to start even when the receiver has not run yet. If you set &#96;PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH&#96; or &#96;PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH&#96; to different paths, use those paths in the includes (relative to Asterisk config directory or absolute as supported). After adding the includes, run:",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "asterisk -rx 'module reload res_pjsip.so'",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "so the includes are read.",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Configure the PBX app to push config",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "On the **host where the Node API runs** (e.g. 10.50.7.181), in &#96;.env&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;env",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "# URL of the config receiver (Asterisk VM). No trailing slash.",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL=http://10.50.2.190:9999",
            "lineNumber": 71
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3853951096534729
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\ASTERISK-CONFIG-SYNC.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 37
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Asterisk config sync (GUI → config files)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "When you create or update **agents**, **SIP extensions**, or **SIP trunks** in the Super Admin dashboard, the app can push the config to your Asterisk server so &#96;agents.conf&#96;, PJSIP extension config, and PJSIP trunk config are updated automatically.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Overview",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- **PBX app** (e.g. 10.50.7.181): After creating/updating an agent, extension, or trunk, it POSTs the full list to a small HTTP service on the Asterisk server.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Asterisk server** (e.g. 10.50.2.190): A small “config receiver” service listens for those POSTs, **creates or overwrites** the target config files (&#96;agents.conf&#96;, &#96;pjsip_custom.conf&#96;, &#96;pjsip_trunks_custom.conf&#96;), then runs the appropriate Asterisk reload. You do not need to create the included files by hand—the receiver creates them on first write.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. Run the config receiver on the Asterisk server",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "On the **Asterisk VM** (10.50.2.190):",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Copy or clone the project so you have the &#96;scripts/asterisk-config-receiver&#96; folder (or copy only that folder and &#96;server.js&#96; + &#96;package.json&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Install and run (Node.js must be installed):",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "   cd scripts/asterisk-config-receiver",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "   npm install   # optional – no deps; or skip if using system node",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "   node server.js",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Optional env vars (create a &#96;.env&#96; or export before running):",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "   | Variable | Default | Description |",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "   |----------|---------|--------------|",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;PORT&#96; | 9999 | HTTP port the receiver listens on. |",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;AGENTS_CONF_PATH&#96; | &#96;/etc/asterisk/agents.conf&#96; | Path to agents.conf. |",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH&#96; | &#96;/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf&#96; | Path to PJSIP extensions (app-generated). |",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH&#96; | &#96;/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf&#96; | Path to PJSIP trunks (app-generated). |",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;CONFIG_API_KEY&#96; | (none) | If set, the PBX app must send header &#96;X-Config-API-Key: &lt;value&gt;&#96;. |",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "   | &#96;ASTERISK_LOG_DIR&#96; | &#96;/var/log/asterisk&#96; | Directory for log files (used by GET &#96;/logs/:file&#96; for the dashboard). |",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "4. The process must be able to **write** to &#96;/etc/asterisk/&#96; and run &#96;asterisk -rx '...'&#96;. For the **Asterisk Logs** dashboard view (remote setup), it must also be able to **read** files under &#96;ASTERISK_LOG_DIR&#96; (e.g. &#96;full&#96;, &#96;messages&#96;, &#96;queue_log&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "5. Keep it running (e.g. systemd service or screen/tmux). Open firewall port 9999 (or your &#96;PORT&#96;) from the PBX app host only.",
            "lineNumber": 37
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.384177565574646
    },
    {

          {
            "text": "export async function syncDialplanToAsterisk() {",
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/\\${Destination_Value},30,b(notify-incoming^s^1(\\${CHANNEL(name)}^\\${UNIQUEID}^\\${CALLERID(num)}^\\${Destination_Value}^direct^\\${CampaignName}))B(notify-answered^s^1(\\${UNIQUEID}^\\${Destination_Value})))&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\"${DIALSTATUS}\"=\"ANSWER\"]?callstatus,s,1)');",
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(ExtFailover=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${EXTENSION_FAILOVER}ExtensionName=\\${Destination_Value}\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(ExtStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value)=${ExtFailover})');",
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\"${ExtStatus}\"=\"OK\"]?WhereToGO,${Destination_Action},1)');",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [VoiceMail] ----",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[VoiceMail]');",
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Voicemail: ${Destination_Value})');",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(VMInfo=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${VOICEMAIL_DETAIL}VMID=\\${Destination_Value}\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(VMStatus,VMMailbox,VMGreeting,VMMaxDuration)=${VMInfo})');",
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\"${VMStatus}\"!=\"OK\"]?hangup)');",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\"${VMGreeting}\"=\"\"]?record)');",
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Playback(${VMGreeting})');",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n(record),Set(VMRecFile=${REC_PATH}/voicemail/${VMMailbox}-${STRFTIME(${EPOCH},,%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}.wav)');",
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Record(${VMRecFile},${VMMaxDuration},5)');",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n(hangup),Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [Announcement] ----",
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[Announcement]');",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Announcement: ${Destination_Value})');",
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(AnnFile=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${SOUND_FILE_PATH}SoundID=\\${Destination_Value}\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\"${AnnFile}\"=\"\"]?done)');",
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Playback(${AnnFile})');",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n(done),Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [AgentLogin] ----",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[AgentLogin]');",
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Agent ${AgentNumber} Request For Login)');",
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Answer()');",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)');",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=\\$",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 624,

          }
        ]
      },
