    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\asterisk\\README-TWO-SETUPS.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Two ways to use the dialplan",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "You can either **keep your current files** and add only the inbound/queue flow, or use **one full file**. Pick one.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Option 1: Keep your current setup (recommended if you already have it)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "You already have:",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **[globals]** in **extensions.conf** (with APIURL, Phase 3 URLs, etc.)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **#include \"pbx.conf\"** (with AgentLogin)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- **#include \"phase3-dialplan.conf\"** (Phase 3 subroutines)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "**Keep all of that as-is.** Then:",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. Add two variables to [globals] in extensions.conf",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "Add these two lines to your existing &#96;[globals]&#96; section (if not already there):",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "INBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "So your globals might look like:",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "[globals]",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "APIURL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLogin=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogin?",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLogout=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogout?",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "US4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLoginSuccess?",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL=${APIURL}IncomingCall?",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED=${APIURL}CallAnswered?",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP=${APIURL}CallHangup?",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "PHASE3_RECORDING=${APIURL}Recording?",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "INBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Add the inbound/queue/extension file",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- Copy **pbx-inbound.conf** to the Asterisk server (e.g. &#96;/etc/asterisk/pbx-inbound.conf&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "- In **extensions.conf** add one more include (order can be after phase3-dialplan.conf):",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "#include \"phase3-dialplan.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "#include \"pbx-inbound.conf\"",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "**Do not** include **pbx-callcentre.conf** here; that would duplicate AgentLogin and Phase 3.",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. Point inbound calls to the new flow",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "Point your trunk/DID to context **inbound** (e.g. in the context that receives the call):",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;ini",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "exten =&gt; _X.,1,Goto(inbound,s,1)",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "**Summary for Option 1:**",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "| File / place | Role |",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "| **extensions.conf** | [globals] + &#96;#include \"pbx.conf\"&#96; + &#96;#include \"phase3-dialplan.conf\"&#96; + &#96;#include \"pbx-inbound.conf\"&#96;. Add INBOUND_ROUTE and QUEUE_MEMBERS to [globals]. |",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "| **pbx.conf** | Keep as-is (AgentLogin). |",
            "lineNumber": 67
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3757830858230591
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\server\\asterisk-config-sync.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 261
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 623,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 262,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 262,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 262,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 263,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export async function syncDialplanToAsterisk() {",
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Answer()');",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)');",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${AGENT_LOGIN}AgentID=\\${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=\\${AgentStatus}\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,CallCause)=${AgentInformation})');",
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Authenticate(${AgentPassword})');",
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginCompleted)');",
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(LoginResult=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${AGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS}AgentID=\\${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=\\${AgentStatus}\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Stasis(\\${STASIS_APP},login,\\${AgentNumber})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 496
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,NoOp(Agent exited Stasis)');",
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 498
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [callstatus] (hangup handler) ----",
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[callstatus]');",
            "lineNumber": 502
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call status handler)');",
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(CallEndTime=${EPOCH})');",
            "lineNumber": 504
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,Set(HangupResult=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${CALL_HANGUP}AgentID=\\${AgentNumber}&amp;UniqueID=\\${CDRID}&amp;Status=completed\")})&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,ExecIf($[\"\\${RecName}\"!=\"\"]?Set(RecResult=\\${SHELL(curl -s --connect-timeout 3 --max-time 5 \"\\${RECORDING}UniqueID=\\${CDRID}&amp;Path=\\${RecName}\")}))&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 506
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Return()');",
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 508
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [ManualCallByExtension] ----",
            "lineNumber": 510
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[ManualCallByExtension]');",
            "lineNumber": 511
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Manual call by ${AgentNumber} to ${CustomerNumber})');",
            "lineNumber": 512
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(RecName=${STRFTIME(${EPOCH},,%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}-${AgentNumber}-${CustomerNumber})');",
            "lineNumber": 513
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(&#96; same =&gt; n,MixMonitor(\\${REC_PATH}/manual/\\${RecName}.wav)&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 514
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${CustomerNumber}@${DEFAULT_TRUNK},60)');",
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Hangup()');",
            "lineNumber": 516
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 517
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [auto-answer-queue] ----",
            "lineNumber": 519
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[auto-answer-queue]');",
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Auto-answer queue call for agent ${AGENT_EXTEN})');",
            "lineNumber": 521
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${AGENT_EXTEN},45,b(auto-answer-sub^s^1))');",
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('');",
            "lineNumber": 523
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ---- [auto-answer-sub] ----",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('[auto-answer-sub]');",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "text": "    L('exten =&gt; s,1,Set(PJSIP_HEADER(add,Alert-Info)=info=alert-autoanswer)');",
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "    L(' same =&gt; n,Set(PJSIP_HEADER(add,Call-Info)=&lt;sip:&gt;\\\\;answer-after=0)');",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 624,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3737644851207733
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\old\\asterisk\\extconfig.conf_bk",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 61
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "; Static and realtime external configuration",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "; engine configuration",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "; See https://wiki.asterisk.org/wiki/display/AST/Realtime+Database+Configuration",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "; for basic table formatting information.",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "[settings]",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "; Static configuration files:",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "; file.conf =&gt; driver,database[,table[,priority]]",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "; maps a particular configuration file to the given",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "; database driver, database and table (or uses the",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "; name of the file as the table if not specified)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "; Uncomment to load queues.conf via the odbc engine.",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": ";queues.conf =&gt; odbc,asterisk,ast_config",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": ";extensions.conf =&gt; sqlite,asterisk,ast_config",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "; The following files CANNOT be loaded from Realtime storage:",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": ";\tasterisk.conf",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": ";\textconfig.conf (this file)",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": ";\tlogger.conf",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "; Additionally, the following files cannot be loaded from",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "; Realtime storage unless the storage driver is loaded",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "; early using 'preload' statements in modules.conf:",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": ";\tmanager.conf",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": ";\tcdr.conf",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": ";\trtp.conf",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "; Named ACLs specified in realtime also can not be used",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "; from manager.conf unless the storage driver is preloaded.",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "; Attempting to use a realtime stored named ACL before the",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "; driver is loaded will result in an invalid ACL which",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "; rejects all addresses.",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "; Realtime configuration engine",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "; maps a particular family of realtime",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "; configuration to a given database driver,",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "; database and table (or uses the name of",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "; the family if the table is not specified",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": ";example =&gt; odbc,asterisk,alttable,1",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": ";example =&gt; mysql,asterisk,alttable,2",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": ";example2 =&gt; ldap,\"dc=oxymium,dc=net\",example2",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "; Additionally, priorities are now supported for use as failover methods",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "; for retrieving realtime data.  If one connection fails to retrieve any",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "; information, the next sequential priority will be tried next.  This",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "; especially works well with ODBC connections, since res_odbc now caches",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "; when connection failures occur and prevents immediately retrying those",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "; connections until after a specified timeout.  Note:  priorities must",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "; start at 1 and be sequential (i.e. if you have only priorities 1, 2,",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "; and 4, then 4 will be ignored, because there is no 3).",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 61
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3734950125217438
    },

            "lineNumber": 36

            "lineNumber": 37

            "text": "; driver is loaded will result in an invalid ACL which",
            "lineNumber": 38

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I now have a complete picture. Let me summarize for a single-server production deployment:

**Stack:**
- **Frontend:** React 19 + Vite 7 → built to `dist/`, needs to be served (nginx or Node serving static)
- **Backend:** Node/Express on PORT 3001 (default)
- **Database:** MySQL (pbx_callcentre)
- **Optional:** Redis (sessions + wallboard cache)
- **Asterisk:** ARI on 8088, HTTP callbacks to app, config receiver on 9999 (when same server, can run config receiver on same host)
- **Recordings:** /var/spool/asterisk/monitor (Asterisk writes; app reads via RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH)

**Single-server layout:**
- Same machine: Asterisk + Node app + MySQL + (optional) Redis + web server (nginx) for static + reverse proxy
- Config receiver: can run on same server (localhost:9999), so Asterisk (local) gets config from app via 127.0.0.1:9999 or we could even merge config receiver into the main app or run it as a separate process on the same host. Actually the doc says "Run the config receiver on the Asterisk server" - so on a single server, the Asterisk server IS the same machine, so we run config receiver on that same machine. The app then uses ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9999.

I'll write a comprehensive production server configuration suggestion.
</details></think>

---


Here’s a **single-server production configuration** that matches your app (Asterisk, recordings, web app, MySQL, optional Redis).

---

## 1. **Server overview**

| Component | Role |
|-----------|------|
| **OS** | Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (or 24.04) recommended |
| **Asterisk** | PBX, ARI (port 8088), SIP/RTP, recordings to `/var/spool/asterisk/monitor` |
| **Node.js** | API + optional static serving of frontend (or use Nginx) |
| **MySQL** | `pbx_callcentre` database |
| **Redis** (optional) | Sessions + wallboard cache |
| **Nginx** (recommended) | HTTPS, static frontend, reverse proxy to Node |

---

## 2. **Hardware suggestions**

- **CPU:** 4+ cores (Asterisk + Node + MySQL)
- **RAM:** 8 GB minimum, 16 GB better for many concurrent calls + MySQL
- **Disk:** SSD; plan for recordings (e.g. ~1 MB/min per call WAV)
- **Network:** Low latency, enough bandwidth for RTP (e.g. 100 Mbps for man

---
